title: The Rocket Revolutionizing Space Travel

scenes.text: China has just achieved a major breakthrough in rocket reusability!
The Long March 10B rocket can be reused multiple times, saving costs.
Reusability could change how we access space, reducing launch expenses.
This could pave the way for affordable space exploration!
scenes.label: ACCESSIBLE SPACE TRAVEL

scenes.text: Follow for a new science fact every day.

description: China's Long March 10B rocket represents a major leap forward in rocket reusability. Follow for daily science!
